description: Chicken-adapted upstream necroptosis/death-receptor program (TNF-RIPK1-FADD-CASP8 axis); intentionally excludes RIPK3 because avian RIPK3 is likely lost/misannotated.
Canonical TNF-NF-kB inflammatory signaling genes spanning receptor, adaptor, IKK, NF-kB, and feedback inhibitor layers.
Combined innate DNA/RNA sensing set for chicken, integrating TLR and cGAS-STING signaling; includes avian TLR15 and TLR21 plus MB21D1-cGAS and TMEM173-STING core nodes.
Core complement cascade genes spanning classical and alternative pathway recognition, convertases, effectors, receptors, and regulation.
Broad avian heterophil/myeloid activation set emphasizing granulocyte lineage, oxidative burst, innate sensing, and inflammatory effector genes.
Core angiogenic/endothelial sprouting and vessel maturation genes centered on VEGF, ANGPT-TEK, and DLL4-NOTCH signaling.
Osteoblast differentiation and matrix mineralization program centered on RUNX2-SP7, BMP-SMAD signaling, and bone matrix genes.
Extracellular matrix turnover/remodeling set including proteases, inhibitors, crosslinking, provisional matrix, and TGF-beta-linked remodeling genes.
Combined cholesterol-mevalonate and fatty-acid synthesis/oxidation set anchored by SREBPs, de novo lipogenesis enzymes, and beta-oxidation genes.
Fracture-healing / endochondral-repair composite spanning inflammatory priming, angiogenesis, cartilage-to-bone transition, osteogenesis, and remodeling.
